name: 18p11_32_subtelomeric_SD
description: 18p subtelomeric SD cluster — small SD modules in the most distal 18p with paralogs to 4p, 8p, and Yq subtelomeric regions. Mediates terminal 18p deletions (18p-) and unbalanced subtelomeric rearrangements.

architecture.internal_structure: Subtelomeric SD modules of ~10-50 kb at ~94-97% identity; share paralog content with other subtelomeres; assembly imperfect in GRCh38.
